meaning: n.咬,苛责,不断的苦痛adj.咬的,使苦恼的
examples: The dog was gnawing a bone.
The problem had been gnawing at him for months.
Fear and anxiety were gnawing her.
All you experience is a gnawing sense that you need to check your phone immediately.
He scratches and scratches, biting at the hot spot on his leg, gnawing.
